semantic.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting language discovery results, conditional banner rendering, and configuration value parsing.
responsibilities: Formats a list of language names into a comma-separated string for display.
Determines whether to show the full ArchSpine banner based on the command (help, init, build) or mini banner (sync).
Parses raw string configuration values into typed JavaScript primitives (booleans, numbers, null, undefined, JSON objects/arrays).
Provides conditional banner display logic to suppress output during internal hooks.
outOfScope: Pipeline or persistence logic (e.g., database access, file I/O, build orchestration).
Command routing or argument parsing beyond banner display decisions.
Core error handling or error code definitions.
invariants: CLI modules must remain thin entrypoints and command adapters, avoiding absorption of pipeline or persistence logic.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain a thin CLI presentation layer that formats output and controls banner visibility, keeping pipeline and persistence logic in services, core, engines, or infra.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Updated displayUIBanner to use the renamed _argsArr parameter, aligning with recent CLI argument handling changes.

English.role: CLI UI presentation utility for formatting language discovery results, conditional banner rendering, and configuration value parsing.
responsibilities: Formats a list of language names into a comma-separated string for display.
Determines whether to show the full ArchSpine banner based on the command (help, init, build) or mini banner (sync).
Parses raw string configuration values into typed JavaScript primitives (booleans, numbers, null, undefined, JSON objects/arrays).
Provides conditional banner display logic to suppress output during internal hooks.
outOfScope: Pipeline or persistence logic (e.g., database access, file I/O, build orchestration).
Command routing or argument parsing beyond banner display decisions.
Core error handling or error code definitions.

Simplified Chinese.role: CLI 用户界面展示工具，用于格式化语言发现结果、条件性渲染横幅以及解析配置值。
responsibilities: 将语言名称列表格式化为逗号分隔的字符串以供显示。
根据命令（help、init、build）决定是否显示完整 ArchSpine 横幅，或为 sync 命令显示迷你横幅。
将原始字符串配置值解析为类型化的 JavaScript 原始值（布尔值、数字、null、undefined、JSON 对象/数组）。
提供条件性横幅显示逻辑，以在内部钩子执行期间抑制输出。
outOfScope: 管道或持久化逻辑（例如数据库访问、文件 I/O、构建编排）。
超出横幅显示决策的命令路由或参数解析。
核心错误处理或错误代码定义。
